backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Client, Intervention, UserProfile, MediaItem) and implementing CRUD operations for clients, interventions, user profiles, blacklist management, and technical folder storage with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features related to client folder navigation, routing to ClientDossierPage, and proper display of client information sections.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files including pages, hooks, components, and their functionality with French localization notes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes for UI components including sidebar, charts, and semantic colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, French language setting, manifest links, Apple touch icons, and noscript fallback message.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA manifest defining app metadata, icons, display mode, theme colors, and orientation for Vial Traite Service application.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for static assets, network-first for navigation requests, and cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for login, clients list, client dossier, technical folder, and dashboard, wrapped with QueryClient, InternetIdentity provider, error boundary, and profile setup dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUnloc: Empty file placeholder for admin unlock dialog component.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog component prompting authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, with form validation and French labels.
frontend/src/components/blacklist/Blackl: Displays and manages client blacklist status with comments and media attachments, allowing users to add or remove clients from the blacklist.
frontend/src/components/clients/CreateCl: Modal dialog form for creating new clients with required fields for name, address, city, state, zip, phone, and email.
frontend/src/components/clients/EditClie: Modal dialog form for editing existing client information, pre-populated with current client data.
Reusable badge component with custom variants including success, warning, and pending states with appropriate styling.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoun: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors with options to retry or reload the application.
frontend/src/components/export/ExportDat: Modal dialog for exporting application data in JSON or PDF format with progress indicator during export.
frontend/src/components/guards/Authentic: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the home page and shows loading state during authentication check.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ad: Dialog component for adding a new intervention with date fields, comments, and media capture. Handles form submission and converts uploaded files to ExternalBlob format.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ed: Dialog component for editing an existing intervention. Pre-populates form with intervention data and allows updating date, comments, and media.
frontend/src/components/interventions/In: Read-only dialog displaying intervention details including date, author, comments, and media. Shows edit button if user has edit permissions.
Lists all interventions for a client with loading/error states and retry logic. Provides add, edit, delete actions and opens detail dialog on card click.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileLay: Main mobile layout wrapper with sticky header showing logo and user profile, logout button, dashboard navigation, connectivity status bar, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/media/FilePicker: Simple file picker button component that programmatically creates and triggers a file input element with configurable accept types and multiple file support.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPicke: Media picker with two options: camera capture using useCamera hook with live preview dialog, or gallery selection via file input. Handles photo capture and file selection callbacks.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPrevi: Displays a grid of media thumbnails from ExternalBlob objects with error handling and optional click-to-view functionality that opens a DocumentViewer modal.
frontend/src/components/sync/Connectivit: Shows a status bar indicating online/offline state and pending sync operations count, with a manual sync button when online and operations are pending.
frontend/src/components/technical-folder: Modal dialog for creating a new folder at a specified path with validation to prevent slashes in folder names.
Full-featured document viewer modal supporting images, PDFs, and videos with zoom, rotation, fullscreen, pinch-to-zoom, and download capabilities.
Returns appropriate Lucide icon component based on file extension (images, PDFs, videos, documents, spreadsheets, or generic file).
Modal dialog with breadcrumb navigation allowing users to browse folder structure and select a destination folder to move a file, preventing moves to the current folder.
Modal dialog for renaming a folder with validation to prevent slashes and empty names, pre-populating with the current folder name.
Card component displaying a file with thumbnail preview, name, and action buttons for viewing, moving, and deleting with confirmation dialogs.
Dialog component for uploading files to the technical folder with file selection, custom naming, upload progress tracking, and path display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlacklist.ts: Provides mutations for marking and unmarking clients as blacklisted with comments and media attachments, invalidating relevant queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useClients.ts: Provides queries and mutations for fetching, creating, and updating clients with offline support via operation queueing and retry logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Provides queries and mutations for fetching and saving user profiles for the current caller or a specific principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useDataExport.ts: Custom hook for exporting all application data (clients, interventions, technical files) to JSON or text format with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, providing login/logout functionality, identity state, and authentication status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useInterventions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting client interventions with offline support via operation queueing and error handling with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: Custom React hook that tracks browser online/offline status using navigator.onLine and window events.
frontend/src/hooks/useSync.ts: Hook that monitors pending offline operations and automatically triggers synchronization when online, exposing sync status and manual sync trigger.
frontend/src/hooks/useTechnicalFolder.ts: React Query hooks for managing technical files including listing, uploading, deleting, moving files and creating folders with error handling and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom brand colors (Vial Traite Service blue/green/orange), light/dark theme variables, and safe-area utilities for mobile devices.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/offline/db.ts: IndexedDB wrapper providing operations for managing offline operation outbox and data cache with object stores for queued operations and cached data.
frontend/src/offline/outbox.ts: IndexedDB interface for enqueueing, retrieving, and removing offline operations with timestamp indexing for sync ordering.
frontend/src/offline/syncEngine.ts: Processes queued offline operations by replaying them through the backend actor, handling various operation types (clients, interventions, blacklist) with error recovery.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDossierPage.tsx: Displays detailed client information including contact details, interventions, and blacklist status. Allows editing client data and navigating back to the clients list.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Lists all clients with search functionality and displays client cards showing name, address, and blacklist status. Provides navigation to individual client dossiers and a dialog to create new clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Shows a calendar for date selection and displays interventions scheduled for the selected date. Includes loading states, error handling with retry functionality, and opens intervention details in a dialog.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles Internet Identity authentication with a login button and loading states. Automatically redirects authenticated users to the clients page.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalFolderPage.t: Manages a hierarchical file browser for technical documents with folder navigation, breadcrumbs, and actions to upload files or create folders. Computes current folder contents and file lists based on navigation path.
frontend/src/pwa/registerServiceWorker.t: Registers the service worker for PWA functionality after page load with a 1-second delay. Includes error handling and browser compatibility checks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support. Includes functions to store, retrieve, and clear parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a fix request for client folder navigation issue where clicking a client folder should properly display the ClientDossierPage with coordinates, interventions, and photos.
